description: E3-T3 dogfood: real past bug-fix commits from smallcode's own history. Each is re-introduced by reverse-applying its SOURCE hunks (the guarding test it added is kept), then the current agent must re-fix it, graded by `bun test`.

commits.note: oracle red-count parsed from full output (single src file + test) — the single-site control
watchdog abstains on large prompts (env.ts + watchdog.ts) — cross-file
contain repair-pass oracle throws so the guard always runs (loop.ts + index.ts) — cross-file, large
scope repair to target fn + gate to assertion reds (loop.ts + types.ts + context) — cross-file
